summary: Applied ADR 0232 from the isolated latest-main worktree by converging the private Nomad server on monitoring-lv3, the runtime and build clients, the Proxmox firewall and Tailscale proxy contract, and the repo-managed smoke jobs, then re-verifying controller access, service placement, and durable batch execution on the live platform.

verification.check: Focused Nomad regression and syntax slice
verification.observed: `uv run --with pytest --with pyyaml pytest tests/test_nomad_cluster_roles.py tests/test_nomad_playbook.py -q` returned `14 passed in 0.11s`, and `ANSIBLE_CONFIG=/Users/live/Documents/GITHUB_PROJECTS/platform_server/.worktrees/ws-0232-live-apply/ansible.cfg ANSIBLE_COLLECTIONS_PATH=/Users/live/Documents/GITHUB_PROJECTS/platform_server/.worktrees/ws-0232-live-apply/collections uvx --from ansible-core ansible-playbook -i inventory/hosts.yml playbooks/nomad.yml --syntax-check` passed.

verification.check: Full Nomad converge from the isolated worktree
verification.observed: `make converge-nomad` completed successfully on 2026-03-28 with final recap `docker-build-lv3 ok=82 changed=5 failed=0`, `docker-runtime-lv3 ok=90 changed=1 failed=0`, `localhost ok=12 changed=0 failed=0`, `monitoring-lv3 ok=98 changed=6 failed=0`, and `proxmox-host ok=50 changed=1 failed=0`.

`curl -sS https://100.64.0.1:8013/v1/status/leader --cacert /Users/live/Documents/GITHUB_PROJECTS/platform_server/.local/nomad/tls/nomad-agent-ca.pem -H "X-Nomad-Token: ..."` returned `"10.10.10.40:4647"`, and `/v1/nodes` through the same proxy reported `docker-runtime-lv3 ready runtime` plus `docker-build-lv3 ready build`.

`sudo /usr/local/bin/lv3-nomad job status lv3-nomad-smoke-service` on `monitoring-lv3` reported `Status = running` with deployment `successful`, `curl -fsS http://10.10.10.30:18180/` on `docker-build-lv3` returned `lv3 nomad smoke service`, and `systemctl is-active lv3-nomad` stayed `active` on the build client.

verification.check: Smoke batch dispatch and durable runtime marker
verification.observed: The latest dispatched batch job `lv3-nomad-smoke-batch/dispatch-1774728409-4a71fa47` reached `Status = dead` with one `complete` allocation on `docker-runtime-lv3`, and `/var/lib/nomad/verification/lv3-nomad-smoke-batch/last-run.log` on the runtime client recorded `adr-0232-live-apply batch verification` plus timestamp `2026-03-28T20:06:51+00:00` while `lv3-nomad` remained `active`.

verification.check: Repo-wide validation and guarded live-apply wrapper on the workstream branch
verification.observed: `make validate` and `make live-apply-service service=nomad env=production` were both exercised after the successful converge. Each run stopped only at the expected protected canonical-truth gate, reporting `Canonical truth is stale` for main-only file `/Users/live/Documents/GITHUB_PROJECTS/platform_server/.worktrees/ws-0232-live-apply/versions/stack.yaml`.

notes: The first branch-local converge attempts exposed three live integration gaps that are now codified in repo automation: the Nomad host play needed `proxmox_network` so the Proxmox VM firewall carried the client-to-server RPC rules, the local `lv3-nomad` wrapper had to use each node's advertised address rather than `127.0.0.1` for TLS, and the smoke service needed `provider = "nomad"` to avoid the implicit Consul constraint.

The original batch proof via `nomad alloc logs` was flaky because completed allocations could be garbage-collected before the server fetched client log state. The committed smoke batch job now writes a durable verification marker to `/var/lib/nomad/verification/lv3-nomad-smoke-batch/last-run.log` on `docker-runtime-lv3`, and the bootstrap role reads that file back as the stable end-to-end proof.

Earlier during investigation, `make converge-guest-network-policy` applied the missing Proxmox-side Nomad firewall rules but ended non-zero on the unrelated pre-existing `postgres-replica-lv3` SSH reachability issue outside ADR 0232 scope.

Protected integration files still remain for the final merge-to-main step on top of this live-applied branch state: `VERSION`, `changelog.md`, the top-level integrated `README.md` summaries, `versions/stack.yaml`, `RELEASE.md`, and release notes. The guarded branch-local `make live-apply-service service=nomad env=production` path is expected to stay blocked until those main-only files are updated from the integration worktree.
